programme.title: Crikey! It's The Irwins
programme.desc: After weeks of being closed due to the pandemic, the Irwins prepare for the reopening of the zoo. Plus, Robert helps deliver a litter of tiger cubs.

programme.title: Beach Hunters
programme.desc: A North Carolina couple searches for a beautiful waterfront vacation property on Oak Island. S5 E6.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A newly-married couple is looking for a home with outdoor space near the beach in James Island, SC. S17 E12.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A new job is giving a Connecticut couple the chance to find a home in Culross, Scotland. S172 E5.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A recently divorced empty nester seeks a stress-free lifestyle in Ojochal, Costa Rica. She's looking for a dream property without breaking the bank.

programme.title: ThreeNews
programme.desc: ThreeNews presents comprehensive coverage of global and local news.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: When the biggest swell of the year rolls in, big wave surfer Jesse decides to test new recruits Tommy and Jules. S12 E10.

programme.title: 7 Days
programme.desc: NZ's longest running comedy show is back for its 18th season of absolute hilarity. Hosted by Jeremy Corbett. Guests: Anthony Crum, Rhys Mathewson, Josh Thomson, Bubbah, Madeleine Sami, Brynley Stent.

programme.title: The Inspired Unemployed (Impractical) Jo
programme.desc: Four friends become waitstaff at a fancy restaurant for a day and give it their all to help embarrass each other In public.

programme.title: Crackhead
programme.desc: As tensions rise and secrets surface, Frankie confronts painful truths that force her to face her dark past, leaving her questioning what - and who - she can trust.

programme.title: Double Parked
programme.desc: Steph and Nat seem to be breaking up. in 2015 where it all began! A secret affair has turned into a very complicated situation. Meanwhile in present day Steph has made a choice.

programme.title: Homebound 3.0
programme.desc: With their fake pregnancy exposed, Melissa and Henry's relationship unravels in a heated fight, leaving their future uncertain.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of London
programme.desc: Panthea throws a party to remember, but not even cake or caviar can mask the fractures in the group.

programme.title: Daddy Issues
programme.desc: Gemma meets an old flame. Derek hatches a plan to get Malcolm's stuff from his old house.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: With the Constructor in dire need of repair, Otto and his crew must save the boat for future use. Eivin takes novice hunter Levi on a last chance hunt. S8 E17.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Raneys struggle to revive an inherited Wyoming homestead with a tragic legacy. To bring water to the property, Marty must solve the mystery of an untapped well.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Shaun Murphy and the team race to save a pregnant woman's baby and find her current situation as a convicted felon complicates it even more than they realize.

programme.title: Pretty Little Liars
programme.desc: Now back in Rosewood, Alison attempts to regain the role of leader of the group, but finds her four friends are not as willing to blindly follow her every whim as they once were.

programme.title: All American
programme.desc: A major tragedy causes Spencer to question everything. Meanwhile, Coop learns disturbing information about a friend, and Jordan is worried about the results of a drug test.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by a homeowner wanting to sell their four-bedroom home in Garden Grove, but they find the layout strange.

programme.title: Killer Grannies
programme.desc: An Army vet is found dead on his farm, initially ruled a suicide. But a hidden cover-up and two grannies with clashing stories spark a disturbing murder mystery.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Island
programme.desc: Bigger risks, more treacherous twists and unprecedented rewards await 13 new players as they arrive on the mysterious new Banker's private island.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A single mum entrepreneur moves to her beloved vacation destination of Puerto Vallarta, Mexico. S172 E6.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After 20 years away, a woman looks to return to Falkirk, Scotland. Her husband is starting a new business, so they need a spacious home.

programme.title: ThreeNews
programme.desc: ThreeNews presents comprehensive coverage of global and local news.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter And The Deathly Hall
programme.desc: Harry, Ron, and Hermione go into hiding as Voldemort seizes the Ministry. They follow Dumbledore's clues to find and destroy Horcruxes. Stars Daniel Radcliffe.

programme.title: 7 Days
programme.desc: NZ's longest running comedy show is back for its 18th season of absolute hilarity. Hosted by Jeremy Corbett. Guests: Anthony Crum, Rhys Mathewson, Josh Thomson, Bubbah, Madeleine Sami, Brynley Stent.

programme.title: Killer Grannies
programme.desc: An Army vet is found dead on his farm, initially ruled a suicide. But a hidden cover-up and two grannies with clashing stories spark a disturbing murder mystery.

programme.title: 9-1-1: Lone Star
programme.desc: Owen helps defend Marjan when a rescue complaint forces her to make a decision; Grace befriends a young boy, but when she discovers he may be In some real danger she must step in.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Charles Stanley
programme.desc: Charles Stanley.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli challenges four chefs to get spicy with South of the Border flavours. Then, they cook up classic blue-plate specials followed by sweet treats.

programme.title: The Aquarium
programme.desc: A curious and active box turtle goes for his daily walk and two wobbegong sharks are due for a check-up. Plus, the staff prepare for puffin breeding season.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple with a $2 million budget asks David to help find a dream home in Ontario, Canada. They want a lot of space for him, and some bling for her.

programme.title: Summer Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmers tasks the bakers to capture the coastal vibe using beach drink trifles! Then, they must create refreshing summer cream pies to avoid a scorching elimination.

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn find a hidden gem in Kaneohe. They transform the modest space into a beautiful blend of nature and island living.

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Jonathan and Drew help Ali Wong revamp her friend's basement. They reimagine the space to give it more comfort and function for family time. S2 E12.

programme.title: Backed By The Bros
programme.desc: Jonathan and Drew help investors on the brink of financial ruin. They complete a new-build triplex that's mired in a commercial rezoning quagmire.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Alison's Dream Home
programme.desc: After ten months of building, Alison is on a mission to finally have a place of her own in Chicago to call home.
